title: Trapdoor Lamp
description: Turns the top iron trapdoor, into a redstone lamp!
body:
# Trapdoor Lamp
This reasourse pack is meant as a redsone-based optimization. It takes the iron trapdoor, top half, and turns it into your redstone lamp of your choosing!

The version is set to 1.21, but it will work with lots of other versions.

### Why?
This reasourse pack is intended for redstoners who want a screen with an instant update, trapdoors, open and close instantly constrasing the instant turn on for lamps and 2 tick delay for turning the lapms off.
